steps.title: Identify the advantage in the notes
steps.content: The notes show that infilling is “minimally invasive” while power grinding “can greatly alter or damage the rock.” The advantage of infilling is that it avoids this damage problem.

steps.title: Find which choice explains this advantage
steps.content:
The correct answer directly states the advantage: infilling is less invasive than power grinding and explains why (power grinding can damage the rock).

Those choices, and D either omit infilling's benefit, present both methods as equal, or mention invasiveness without clarifying which approach is better.

That confirms B is correct.
